title: What Can AI Do For You Today? 7 Practical Uses in 2025
summary: AI is no longer just for tech companies. Here are 7 practical things you can do with free AI tools right now — no technical skills needed.
content:
# What Can AI Do For You Today? 7 Practical Uses in 2025

AI tools have become genuinely useful for everyday people — not just developers. Here are 7 things you can do with free AI right now.

## 1. Generate a Resume in 2 Minutes

Forget spending 3 hours formatting a Word document. Describe your experience in plain English and get a complete, formatted resume in seconds.

**How:** Open Forjit AI → Documents tab → Resume PDF → Describe your experience → Download.

**Tip:** Be specific. "Software engineer with 3 years at Infosys in Java, led a team of 4, seeking senior role at a product company" gives better results than "software engineer looking for job".

## 2. Plan a Week of Meals With Calories

AI can generate a complete 7-day meal plan with breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks, calorie counts, and prep times — customised for vegetarian/non-vegetarian, budget, and cuisine preferences.

**How:** Forjit AI → Content Planner → Weekly Meal Plan → Describe your needs.

## 3. Calculate Your Actual Tax Liability

India's income tax rules change every year. Our [income tax calculator](/tools/income-tax-calculator.html) compares New Regime vs Old Regime instantly and tells you which one saves more money.

## 4. Build a Simple Web App Without Coding

Need a habit tracker, expense calculator, or quiz app? Describe it in plain English and get a working HTML app in under 30 seconds.

**Example prompts that work well:**
- "Daily expense tracker with category filters and monthly summary"
- "Pomodoro timer with task list and session counter"
- "Quiz app with 10 questions about Indian history"

## 5. Create a Workout Plan for Your Goals

AI can build a 30-day workout plan customised for your fitness level, available equipment, and goals — with sets, reps, rest times, and form cues.

## 6. Get a Salary Breakdown Before Accepting an Offer

Before accepting a job offer, use the [salary calculator](/tools/salary-calculator.html) to convert CTC to actual in-hand salary — with PF, professional tax, and income tax deductions calculated.

## 7. Write a Cover Letter for Any Job

Describe the role and your background — get a professional cover letter that you can download as a DOCX file and edit.

---

## Important Note on AI Results

AI tools are powerful but not perfect. Always review AI-generated content before submitting it professionally, filing taxes based on calculator results, or making financial decisions. When in doubt — verify with a CA, financial advisor, or domain expert.
